command.text:
&UnitConversionViewIndex;
if exists(select 1 from options where name = 'm_compact_mode' and val = '1') select '1' as view_index else select '0' as view_index

processing.text: if @@admin = 0 and @type = '1' begin if @@sysDatabaseName.dbo.FastBusiness$System$GetAuthorize(@@admin, @@userID, 'Item', 'Edit') = 0 select @type = '0' end declare @message nvarchar(4000), @q nvarchar(4000), @duplicate nvarchar(4000), @irregular nvarchar(4000), @field varchar(32), @irregularChars varchar(128), @r int select @irregularChars = &IrregularValue; select @duplicate = case @@language when 'v' then N'Giá trị tại ô %invalidCell &Item.Nested.Message.v;.' else 'The value of cell %invalidCell is &Item.Nested.Message.e;.' end select @irregular = case @@language when 'v' then N'Giá trị tại ô %invalidCell có chứa các ký tự: ' + @irregularChars else 'The value of cell %invalidCell contains any of the following characters: ' + @irregularChars end create index i on @@table (ma_vt) -- Check if @type = '0' delete @@table where ma_vt in (select ma_vt from dmvt) select @field = 'ma_vt', @r = min(stt) from @@table where ma_vt like '%[' + @irregularChars + ']%'&Irregular; -- Checking &Checking; select a.*, cast(0 as bit) as ps into #k from @@table a join dmvt b on a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt -- Do not delete following line -- #OverwriteChecking if @type = '1' delete @@table where ma_vt in (select ma_vt from #k) -- select @field = 'ma_vt' &Item.Nested.Key.b; select @q = 'select top 1 @r = a.stt from @@table a, @@table b with (index(i)) where a.ma_vt <> b.ma_vt and a.ma_vt like rtrim(b.ma_vt) + ''%''' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@r int output', @r = @r output&Duplicate; select @q = 'select top 1 @r = a.stt from @@table a with (index(i)), dmvt b with (index(PK_dmvt)) where a.ma_vt like rtrim(b.ma_vt) + ''%''' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@r int output', @r = @r output&Duplicate; select @q = 'select top 1 @r = b.stt from dmvt a with (index(PK_dmvt)), @@table b with (index(i)) where a.ma_vt like rtrim(b.ma_vt) + ''%''' exec sp_executesql @q, N'@r int output', @r = @r output&Duplicate; end -- Insert &Inserting; insert into dmqddvt(ma_vt, dvt, he_so, xtype, status, datetime0, datetime2, user_id0, user_id2) select ma_vt, dvt, 1, 'S', '1', getdate(), getdate(), @@userID, @@userID from @@table where nhieu_dvt = 1 if @type = 1 begin create index i on #k (ma_vt) select distinct ma_vt into #ct70 from ct70 where ma_vt in (select ma_vt from #k) select distinct ma_vt into #ct90 from ct90 where ma_vt in (select ma_vt from #k) create index i on #ct70 (ma_vt) create index i on #ct90 (ma_vt) update #k set ps = 1 from #k a join #ct70 b on a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt update #k set ps = 1 from #k a join #ct90 b on a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt delete dmqddvt from dmqddvt a join #k b on a.ma_vt = b.ma_vt where a.xtype = 'S' and b.ps = 0 insert into dmqddvt(ma_vt, dvt, he_so, xtype, status, datetime0, datetime2, user_id0, user_id2) select ma_vt, dvt, 1, 'S', '1', getdate(), getdate(), @@userID, @@userID from #k where nhieu_dvt = 1 and ps = 0 &Updating; end
